creator: astatutov@gmail.com
text:
After boot loader multi choice menu FreeBSD 8.0 waits about 2 minutes to
boot just showing "|" sign.

Here are the same problem reports:
http://unix.derkeiler.com/Mailing-Lists/FreeBSD/questions/2010-01/msg00983.html

Also, switching between virtual consoles takes about 1-2 seconds, so I
think this problem can be related with the new TTY subsystem.

How-To-Repeat: Buy Intel s5500wb board, then boot FreeBSD 8.1
